title: scutellaria araxensis
intro: Scutellaria araxensis, also known as Arax Cluster-flower, is a perennial plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to the Caucasus region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Scutellaria araxensis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and providing antioxidant protection, which can help in preventing various diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disorders. Scutellaria araxensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine in the form of essential oils and extracts.
